title: activate_subscription comment says step 1 then step 3 -- missing step 2
description: payment_watcher.rs:354 comments '// 1. Write subscription...' and payment_watcher.rs:362 comments '// 3. Notify the client...'. Step 2 is absent. Either the numbering was wrong (there was a step 2 that was removed) or the comments were never correct. Remove step numbering or add the missing step label.
